No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to eradicating poverty or its targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health, well-being, or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is fundamentally about teacher training, directly supporting Target 4.c ('increase the supply of qualified teachers') and improving teaching quality for effective learning (Target 4.1). Both models converged on this high score.
evidence: Teaching Methods and Materials in Integrated Activity

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly prepares students for a teaching profession ('擬於未來擔任綜合活動領域課程教師'), directly contributing to productive employment and decent work for future teachers (Target 8.5). Both models converged on this score.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or life on land.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course includes activities like interviewing teachers and observing classes in schools ('教學現場綜合活動領域教師之訪談內容', '教學現場進行觀課活動'), which implies partnerships and contributes to capacity-building within the education sector (Target 17.9). Both models converged on this score.
